description: Backup of cron job configs for daily-briefs. Recreate after container reinstall if needed.

payload.message:
Run the daily-briefs pipeline with health monitoring:

1. Run: daily-briefs run_daily --skip-enrich
2. Check exit code. If it failed:
   - Run: curl -fsS --retry 3 https://hc-ping.com/a8625459-cc2d-4232-8441-d4091de62f2a/fail
   - Send Telegram to chat -1003700767295 (topic 934): "❌ Daily Brief FAILED: <error details>"
   - Stop here
3. On success, read the generated report from ~/workspace/Projects/daily-briefs/reports/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md
4. Send Telegram summary to chat -1003700767295 (topic 934) with:
   - ✅ Daily Brief complete
   - Number of papers ingested
   - Number selected per stream (Popular/Interest/Serendipity)
   - Top 3-5 interesting paper titles
5. Commit and push: cd ~/workspace/Projects/daily-briefs && git add reports/ && git commit -m "Daily report $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" && git push
6. Ping health check: curl -fsS --retry 3 https://hc-ping.com/a8625459-cc2d-4232-8441-d4091de62f2a

Generate embeddings and UMAP projections with health monitoring:

1. cd /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/Projects/daily-briefs
2. Run: .venv/bin/python scripts/embed.py --umap
3. Check exit code. If it failed:
   - Run: curl -fsS --retry 3 https://hc-ping.com/a3bc824a-c526-4365-a6c0-6faaaed8098f/fail
   - Send Telegram to chat -1003700767295 (topic 934): "❌ Embeddings FAILED: <error details>"
   - Stop here
4. On success, send Telegram to chat -1003700767295 (topic 934):
   - ✅ Embeddings complete
   - Number of papers embedded
   - Number of UMAP projections updated
5. Ping health check: curl -fsS --retry 3 https://hc-ping.com/a3bc824a-c526-4365-a6c0-6faaaed8098f
